error_quality: Custom BankAccountError with descriptive messages (positive integer / exceeds balance / must be integer).
notes: balance>=0 is guaranteed by hand-written runtime checks, not by the type system or any verified contract. Python is dynamically typed with no static guarantees. _validate_amount rejects non-int (and bool) and amounts <=0 by raising BankAccountError; withdraw raises before mutating when amount > balance. Because the only mutation paths require a validated positive int and withdraw mutates only after the sufficiency check, the integer balance can never go below 0 and is never left in an invalid state on error (state is mutated only after all checks pass).
